## AIONS VENTURES
## Investing in Tomorrow's Innovative Solutions
At Aions Ventures, we’re dedicated to fostering innovation and driving growth. Our mission is to empower visionary entrepreneurs who are shaping the future
[ VIEW OUR PORTFOLIO ](http://aions.ventures/portfolio/)
* [ WATCH NOW ](https://youtu.be/Bhp_4SpoEus)
## LEVEL FINANCE
## Building and co-creating wellness benefits that support employees in moments that matter.
Level Finance was founded on the belief that financial wellness should be accessible to everyone at every stage of life. We’re building game-changing salary-linked employee benefits, reducing the systemic burden placed on millions of employees.
[ VIEW OUR PORTFOLIO ](http://aions.ventures/portfolio/)
* [ WATCH NOW ](https://youtu.be/amnr_sIkBSM)
## TUBBY’S KITCHEN
## Elevating the Cannabis Experience
Tubby’s Kitchen is more than just a cannabis manufacturing company; we’re pioneers in the industry, dedicated to setting new standards for quality, innovation, and compliance.
[ VIEW OUR PORTFOLIO ](http://aions.ventures/portfolio/)
* [ WATCH NOW ](https://youtu.be/34RlCM4BkPc)
## MITCHAN ADAMS
## CEO and Founder of Aions Ventures

![](https://aions.ventures/)
## Empowering Growth, Financing the Future.
Our approach is hands-on and values-driven. We don’t just invest in companies, we invest in people, ideas, and lasting impact.
[ ABOUT US ](http://aions.ventures/about/)
![](https://aions.ventures/)
## Seed Fund Gurus: Building Tomorrow’s Giants, One Venture at a Time
In a market where the pipeline between pre-seed, seed, and VC-ready businesses is dry, we’re breaking barriers and building bridges.
[ FUND MANAGEMENT ](https://aions.ventures/fund-management/)
![](https://aions.ventures/)
## Ready to Turn Spare Change into Smart Investments?
At AEX, we make growing your wealth simple, secure, and accessible—because your financial future shouldn’t wait.
[ VISIT AEX ](https://aions.ventures/aex)
![](https://aions.ventures/)
## Giving the Youth Permission to Dream
Avata’s Permission to Dream (P2D) initiative, in partnership with the Aions Exchange, empowers underprivileged youth through training, resources, and funding for wealth-building opportunities.
[ AVATA ](https://aions.ventures/avata/)
![](https://aions.ventures/)
## Trade Finance: Fueling Growth for Cash-Hungry Businesses
Unlock new opportunities and expand your business with Aions Ventures’ tailored trade finance solutions.
[ TRADE FINANCE ](https://aions.ventures/trade-finance)

leadership.name: Ugan
leadership.bio: Compliance backbone of Aions Ventures, overseeing investment and financial management activities, with over two decades of experience in financial planning, investment management, and estate planning.

leadership.name: Kerryn Campion
leadership.bio: COO of Aions Ventures, strategic leader with over two decades of experience in product development, business strategy, and venture building, focused on South Africa's economic development.

leadership.name: Mitchan Adams
leadership.bio: Serial entrepreneur and co‑founder of Ozow Payments, focused on South Africa's startup ecosystem and leadership at Aions Ventures.
